manifest.name: sweetalert2
manifest.description: A beautiful, responsive, customizable and accessible (WAI-ARIA) replacement for JavaScript's popup boxes, supported fork of sweetalert

scripts.lint: stylelint src/**/*.scss && eslint src cypress *.js *.ts && prettier --check src/**/*.js cypress/**/*.js *.js

manifest.readme:
A beautiful, responsive, customizable, accessible (WAI-ARIA) replacement
for JavaScript's popup boxes. Zero dependencies. --- ### [Installation](https://sweetalert2.github.io/#download) | [Usage](https://sweetalert2.github.io/#usage) | [Examples](https://sweetalert2.github.io/#examples) | [Recipe gallery](https://sweetalert2.github.io/recipe-gallery/) | [Themes](https://github.com/sweetalert2/sweetalert2-themes) | [React](https://github.com/sweetalert2/sweetalert2-react-content) | [Angular](https://github.com/sweetalert2/ngx-sweetalert2) | [:heart: Donate](https://sweetalert2.github.io/#donations) --- :moneybag: [Get $100 in free credits with DigitalOcean!](https://m.do.co/c/12907f2ba0bf) --- Sponsors -------- For all questions related to sponsorship please contact me via email limon.monte@protonmail.com
